reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención en el minishop, el café con leche y las medialunas al mejor estilo y con buena onda, los baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service in the convenience store, the coffee with milk and croissants were very stylish and friendly, and the bathrooms were clean.

reviews.comment:
Lamentable. En plena época de pandemia los baños estaban cerrados por falta de agua. Insólito por ser del A.C.A.

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame. In the middle of the pandemic, the restrooms were closed due to a lack of water. Unbelievable, especially since it's an A.C.A. (Automobile Club of Argentina).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9753367623669844910/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2c2ViU3h3RRAB

reviews.comment:
El shop estaba cerrado cuando en el cartel de horarios  decía que debía estar abierto, no nos permitieron el ingreso a los sanitarios. Cargamos combustible porque ya habíamos parado.

(Translated by Google)
The shop was closed when the sign said it should be open, and we weren't allowed into the restrooms. We filled up with gas because we'd already stopped.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9753367623669844910/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2akt5MEN3EAE

reviews.comment:
La estación es súper chiquita y estuvimos un rato en la cola hasta que nos atendieron. Buena atención y los baños estaban en buenas condiciones. El mini shop tiene varias cositas y unas mesas para tomar algo alli

(Translated by Google)
The station is tiny, and we had to wait in line for a while before being served. The service was good, and the restrooms were in good condition. The mini-shop has a few things and some tables where you can have a drink.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9753367623669844910/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2OU1iLWd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención de todas las personas que trabajan en el lugar! Gente muy amable.
Muy buena higiene en los baños

(Translated by Google)
The staff were excellent! Very friendly.
The restrooms were very clean.
